work.name: SK Telecom
work.summary: A.X Foundation Model Development & LLM Benchmarking
highlights: Designed and constructed post-training datasets for large-scale model training
Developed proprietary in-house benchmarks to evaluate model performance
Developed Korean language understanding train data and improved model performance
Development of Telco domain-specific benchmarks
Development of Korean safety benchmarks and LLM-as-a-Judge models
Development and operation of in-house benchmarking systems

work.name: Neurocle
highlights: OCR: Improved recognition performance while reducing training time
Lightweight Anomaly Detection: Designed and implemented efficient anomaly detection models
Smart Labeling Models: Converted and optimized models for smart labeling tasks
Transfer Learning: Verified and evaluated transfer learning performance

work.name: CVML Lab. Chung-Ang University
highlights: DPSGAN experiment and MDADN lightweight project were conducted

publications.name: TelAgentBench: A Multi-faceted Benchmark for Evaluating LLM-based Agents in Telecommunications
TelBench: A Benchmark for Evaluating Telco-Specific Large Language Models
Deep-plane sweep generative adversarial network for consistent multi-view depth estimation

awards.title: Prize of Chief of Naval Operations
awards.awarder: Department of Defense, Ministry of Science and ICT
awards.summary: Developed a photo security application for military personnel and advanced the object detection algorithm for detecting military objects.

awards.title: Encouragement Prize
awards.summary: At the Barrier Free App Development Contest, awarded the Encouragement Prize by creating 'Pharmacy Information Service for the Visually Impaired.'

projects.name: A.X Foundation Model
projects.description: Data design and construction for the 500B-parameter A.X K1 Foundation Model
highlights: Designed and constructed post-training datasets
Designed and constructed Korean language understanding datasets

projects.name: TelcoLLM, TelBench, TelAgentBench
projects.description: Built TelcoLLM in collaboration with OpenAI and Anthropic
highlights: Achieved high agent satisfaction score
TelBench: Designed and built Automatic Evaluation & LLM-as-a-Judge for Telco capability assessment
Designed and built LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation with strong correlation metrics
AICC deployment: LLM commercialized for AICC in-call RAG and post-call analysis

projects.name: Smaller, Safer, Stronger: SK Telecom Tunes Gemma 4B for Multilingual Customer Support Moderation
projects.description: Developed multilingual LLM model for detecting harmful/inappropriate content in chat and email
highlights: Achieved equal or superior performance in both Korean and English compared to proprietary models such as GPT-4.1 and Claude Sonnet 3.7
Applied SFT + PPO reinforcement learning on small models including Gemma 4B and Llama 3.1 8B
Outperformed proprietary large models with small open models
